name: Frosted Jam Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour three 9-inch cake pans.
3. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the eggs, then add the jam, blending well after each addition.
5. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, allspice, and cinnamon) together.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients and buttermilk to the creamed mixture, blending well after each addition.
7. Stir in the raisins and nuts.
8. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
9. Bake for 35-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Cool on wire racks for 5 minutes.
11. Turn the cakes out of the pans to cool to room temperature.
12. When cooled, spread with warm frosting.
